evidence.description: Wikipedia confirms Bazrpash was formerly CEO of SAIPA and Pars Khodro before his ministerial appointment.

evidence.source_title: Mehrdad Bazrpash Named Iran's Minister Of Roads — Iran Front Page
evidence.description: Iran Front Page biography of Bazrpash confirms his prior role as CEO of SAIPA automotive group.

editorial_notes: Bazrpash was CEO of SAIPA (and also Pars Khodro) before his appointment as Roads Minister in 2022.
